mapper.sql: id, file_name, import_type, total_count, success_count, error_count, error_details, import_status, operator_id, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_import_log ( file_name, import_type, total_count, success_count, error_count, error_details, import_status, operator_id, version, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{fileName}, #{importType}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{errorCount}, #{errorDetails}, #{importStatus}, #{operatorId}, 0, #{createBy}, NOW() )
